creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hm, not sure but it seems there are some new issues with the new version.

I have one master and a couple of syndics in other network zones/locations.
After upgrading the master, only systems directly connected to the master where reachable.
Systems connected to a downstream master/syndic are no longer reachable.
Unluckily I don't have the time today to dive further into the issue, perhaps the maintainer can do a quick verify.
